raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The contribution claim (OOD robustness via gradient-frequency penalization) is stated but underdeveloped; 'make this stronger' plausibly targets a sharper, more defensible framing of the mechanism and its theoretical motivation.","R1.2":"A significant logical gap is present: the conclusion asserts 'substantially improves OOD robustness' and invokes 'fundamental limitation of ERM,' but the premises (three standard test-set accuracies) do not license that inference; strengthening the passage requires closing or acknowledging this gap.","R1.3":"The central claim—OOD robustness—is not directly evidenced by the reported metrics, which are standard (in-distribution) top-1 accuracies on CIFAR-10/100/ImageNet test sets rather than recognized OOD benchmarks (e.g., ImageNet-C, CIFAR-10-C, DomainNet); this is the most actionable evidence-claim misalignment.","R1.6":"'Make this stronger' is a canonical prose-improvement instruction; sentence-level concision, rhetorical impact, and paragraph cohesion are squarely in scope and would improve the passage independent of logical changes."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'make this stronger' prioritize rhetorical and prose improvements (sharper sentences, bolder framing, tighter paragraphs), or logical and evidential strengthening (addressing the OOD-claim vs. in-distribution-metric gap, qualifying or supporting the ERM-failure inference)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim (OOD robustness via gradient-frequency penalization) is stated but underdeveloped; 'make this stronger' plausibly targets a sharper, more defensible framing of the mechanism and its theoretical motivation.
rationale.R1.2: A significant logical gap is present: the conclusion asserts 'substantially improves OOD robustness' and invokes 'fundamental limitation of ERM,' but the premises (three standard test-set accuracies) do not license that inference; strengthening the passage requires closing or acknowledging this gap.
rationale.R1.3: The central claim—OOD robustness—is not directly evidenced by the reported metrics, which are standard (in-distribution) top-1 accuracies on CIFAR-10/100/ImageNet test sets rather than recognized OOD benchmarks (e.g., ImageNet-C, CIFAR-10-C, DomainNet); this is the most actionable evidence-claim misalignment.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' is a canonical prose-improvement instruction; sentence-level concision, rhetorical impact, and paragraph cohesion are squarely in scope and would improve the passage independent of logical changes.

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'make this stronger' prioritize rhetorical and prose improvements (sharper sentences, bolder framing, tighter paragraphs), or logical and evidential strengthening (addressing the OOD-claim vs. in-distribution-metric gap, qualifying or supporting the ERM-failure inference)?
